Sandbox_LKS_EletricidadeConstrucao_Eletr: Enables building-based generator networks, shared load, and realistic power distribution.
Sandbox_LKS_EletricidadeConstrucao_Heati: Enable the building heating system. This setting is currently supported reliably in singleplayer. When disabled, generators will not heat buildings and consume no fuel for heating. Default: Enabled
Sandbox_LKS_EletricidadeConstrucao_Barre: Allows linking fuel barrels to the generator pool for automatic refueling.
Sandbox_LKS_EletricidadeConstrucao_Refri: Enables native LKS fridge and freezer on/off behavior.
Sandbox_LKS_EletricidadeConstrucao_Laund: Enables dynamic menus and icons for washers, dryers, and washer-dryer combos.
Sandbox_LKS_EletricidadeConstrucao_Cooki: Enables electric state menus for stoves and microwaves.
Sandbox_LKS_EletricidadeConstrucao_Debug: Enables helper panels and commands for in-game development and auditing.
Sandbox_LKS_EletricidadeConstrucao_HeatR: Radius in tiles for each heat source. Larger values heat bigger areas but may need fewer heat sources. Default: 20 tiles (Range: 15 to 100)
Sandbox_LKS_EletricidadeConstrucao_Strai: Enable generator damage from strain when overloaded (>100% strain). When disabled, generators won't take condition damage from strain. Fuel consumption increase from strain still applies. Default: Enabled
Sandbox_LKS_EletricidadeConstrucao_BaseL: Base load a single generator can handle before reaching 100% strain. Higher values reduce strain for the same building load. Default: 120.0 (Range: 20.0 to 500.0)
Sandbox_LKS_EletricidadeConstrucao_MaxCo: Hard cap for tracked powered consumers in one building scan. Higher values support larger builds but increase scan cost. Default: 500 (Range: 50 to 5000)
Sandbox_LKS_EletricidadeConstrucao_MaxGe: Maximum number of generators that may be associated with one building or pool. Higher values support larger setups but increase state size and scan cost. Default: 10 (Range: 1 to 50)
